description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a mix of geometric forms, featuring both smooth and textured wall surfaces. The front facade includes a covered carport, a driveway, and a gated entrance, with landscaped areas including trees and shrubs. The house has expansive windows, some in vertical strips and others as large arched panes, providing ample natural light. The rear and side elevations reveal additional outdoor spaces, such as patios and a possible terrace, as well as a variety of window shapes and arrangements. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall and fence, offering privacy and security. The overall design blends contemporary and minimalist elements with subtle decorative touches, such as the circular window and brickwork.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with a mix of smooth and textured surfaces, expansive windows, a gated driveway, and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, front garden, and perimeter fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, additional outdoor spaces, and the back of the house with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the arched windows, brickwork, and a circular window feature, as well as a side patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side garden, and the rear of the carport structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched and vertical strip windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered carport, wide driveway, modern door, and a gated fence with landscaped approach.
